notes:
v0.6.32: queue retry self-heal + right-click silent send UX

Files no longer stuck in queue after a single transient failure — the auto-save loop now retries on every poll until both download and accept succeed, with real errors surfaced to the dev console. For right-click Send to Friend: recipient gets a real-time toast the moment the sender starts uploading (was previously only on upload completion), and sender sees live progress percentage in the tray tooltip ('VORP — Sending file.zip (47%)') so the silent-window UX has a visible affordance for hovering.
